# v1 / v2 Resource Coverage

> Regenerate after `make provider`:
>
> ```sh
> go run ./provider/tools/v1-v2-coverage
> ```
>
> The v1→v2 mapping is hand-curated in [provider/tools/v1-v2-coverage/main.go](../provider/tools/v1-v2-coverage/main.go); the v2-only rows come from `schema.json`.
